customer_menu.cards: Flat background #FFFFFF, no border on mobile, slight 1px border on desktop. Image on top (or left for list view), rounded-xl.
customer_menu.navigation: Sticky top category pills (glassmorphism if overlapping content), hiding scrollbar.
customer_menu.cart_fab: Floating action button, bottom center/right, using Primary color, heavy shadow, rounded-full.
customer_menu.images: max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none. For item images, aspect-square or 4:3 object-cover.

admin_dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left, #FFFFFF background, border-r #E4E4E7. Links hover to light gray (#F4F4F5) with primary accent color text.
admin_dashboard.widgets: Flat cards, 1px border (#E4E4E7), no heavy shadow. Value in text-3xl font-bold.
admin_dashboard.order_board: Kanban-style columns (New, Preparing, Ready) or a dense data table. Status badges pill-shaped (rounded-full).
admin_dashboard.forms: Shadcn UI Form, Input, Select. Minimal borders, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E25E3E].

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

hero_background.description: Warm restaurant interior for admin login background or landing page.

empty_state.description: Clean minimal plate/table layout representing empty cart.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the layout is highly responsive. The customer side must feel like a native mobile app with sticky bottom/top bars and large touch targets.
For the admin side, use Shadcn UI tables and cards to ensure high density and clarity for operations.
Apply 'font-cabinet-grotesk' or similar custom sans to headings and 'font-manrope' to body text.
Use '#E25E3E' for primary calls-to-action to stimulate appetite and create a warm vibe.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Use the provided image URLs as actual image sources, do not use placeholder domains.
